note: Directional wallets falsely tagged MM/trader. Primary gate: closed-positions both-sides rate on sports markets (conditionId with ≥2 outcomes). Hold-to-resolve is secondary — nearly all closed sports legs eventually settle. Never write these into sharp_intel_excluded_wallets. Batch3/4 reinstates hardened with fuller history (maxClosed 1500–2000) and broad sport filter after classifier gaps undercounted both-sides on some names.
